description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a circular plot of green lawn with a paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance. The house features a flat, dark-colored roof and a clean, geometric facade with large windows on both floors, allowing for ample natural light. The front of the house has a prominent entryway with a covered porch and a garage integrated into the structure. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray tone, contrasting with the darker roof and window frames. The landscaping is minimal, with defined paths and a driveway connecting to the street. The rear of the house includes a small patio area and additional windows, maintaining the modern, functional aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat dark roof, large windows, and a light gray facade, set on a landscaped plot with a driveway and walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, large windows, and paved driveway leading to the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway and walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio area, rear windows, and the flat roof extending over the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the side yard, and the connection to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on both floors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, single door, and adjacent garage, accessed by a paved walkway and driveway.
